Text.Page:
All the Free Brotherhood ever wanted was to be treated fairly. We worked hard to grow our crops, and we wanted to be paid for that.

But then some of us started...changing into...those monsters. I have no idea why I was spared. But please...you must kill the {@LinkCreature:19#4002#Lokians}.

Bring me the tokens they wear. There's something I want to do.
I'd really appreciate having those tokens.
